nl_query: Which boards have honorarium summaries computed but not yet approved, and what is the total pending honorarium amount per board broken down by evaluator role?
failed_sql: SELECT b.id AS board_id, b.name AS board_name, SUM(hs.final_amount) AS total_pending_honorarium FROM board b JOIN honorarium_summary hs ON hs.board_id = b.id WHERE hs.approval_status = 'PENDING' GROUP BY b.id, b.name ORDER BY total_pending_honorarium DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): academic_unit.display_name. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
